docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-21-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NO APPEARANCES. CASE CONTINUED. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOICE, STEPHANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FELTS, MATHEW $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,802.00, BREACH OF MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BY DEFENDANT. BALANCE OF $1750 NOW DUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
